confidence: High — official vendor status page plus corroboration
issue_summary: Exchange Online mailbox access is degraded for a broad set of tenants while Microsoft investigates.
why_you_care: Clients may report mail access issues and your helpdesk can get ahead of the noise with one clean explanation.
impact: Likely user-facing disruption with cross-client ticket volume potential.
response_1: Check the official incident page before troubleshooting individual mailboxes so you do not waste technician cycles on a platform-side issue.
response_2: Notify impacted clients with a brief status note and pause non-urgent mailbox remediation until vendor guidance changes.
